overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a rainy night in the historic city of Saint Denis. The character exits a narrow alleyway onto wet cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas lamps, passing historic buildings with balconies and encountering a horse-drawn carriage and rider at an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alleyway with stone arch

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow alleyway toward an arched exit illuminated by a red lantern

entered.detail: stone archway at the end of the alley leading to the street beyond
red paper lantern hanging from the archway ceiling providing warm light
wooden door set into the left alley wall
posters or notices affixed to the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, sheltered alleyway with stone walls. A red paper lantern hangs from the ceiling ahead, casting warm light on the stone archway exit. The ground is paved with stone tiles, and the space is enclosed with no sky visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street with gas lamps

events.description: exits the narrow alleyway into the open cobblestone street exposed to heavy rain
emerges from sheltered alley into rain-lit street with gas lamp illumination

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet cobblestone street with an iron fence on the right and historic buildings on the left

entered.detail: wet cobblestone street reflecting the warm glow of street lamps
ornate black iron fence running along the right side of the street
cast iron gas lamp post emitting warm yellow light
multi-story historic stone building with balconies and arched windows

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley onto a rain-soaked cobblestone street illuminated by gas lamps. An ornate iron fence lines the right side while historic stone buildings with balconies rise on the left. The transition from the sheltered alley to the exposed rainy street creates a dramatic lighting change.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with KUO CHAO mercantile building

events.description: lightning flash briefly illuminates the entire street and sky

agents.ego_description: walking past the KUO CHAO & CO building and a parked horse-drawn carriage on the left

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked on the left side of the street

entered.detail: historic commercial building with red KUO CHAO & CO signage and arched doorways
red paper lanterns hanging from the building facade
wrought iron balconies on the upper floors of the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the commercial district passing the prominent KUO CHAO & CO building with its red signage and hanging lanterns. A horse-drawn carriage is parked on the left side of the wet cobblestone street. A sudden lightning flash at 28 seconds briefly illuminates the rainy night sky and reflects off the wet ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with tram tracks and overhead wires

events.description: horse rider passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection as a horse rider passes by on the left

notable_agents.action: horse and rider trotting past on the left side of the street

entered.detail: multi-story corner building with lit windows at the intersection
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street
overhead electrical wires for trams spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks through a wider intersection with tram tracks embedded in the cobblestones and overhead wires visible against the dark sky. A horse rider passes by on the left. The corner building on the right features illuminated windows, and the street opens up with buildings visible on both sides extending into the foggy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a sheltered alleyway into the expansive, rain-slicked streets of a historic city at night. It begins within a narrow stone corridor, moving toward a red paper lantern that casts a warm glow over a stone archway exit. As the character emerges from the alley, the scene shifts dramatically from the enclosed space to an exposed cobblestone street where gas lamps illuminate ornate iron fences and stone buildings with balconies. The camera then continues through the commercial district past the red signage of the Kuo Chao & Co building and a parked horse-drawn carriage, just as a sudden flash of lightning briefly brightens the rainy sky and reflects off the wet ground. Finally, the view opens up into a wide intersection with embedded tram tracks and overhead wires, passing a horse rider before the street extends into the foggy distance between illuminated buildings.
